{{Infobox character
| name = Processor
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Processor]] spoke about compartmentalization and recruitment batches.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Processor]] is skilled at breaking into systems.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Processor]] lamented that they were not made to work together.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Processor]] questions why the [[Aether]] awakened them if they cannot work together.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Compartmentalization, as I said,” the Processor responded.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“We weren’t made this way,” The Processor lamented.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Why did the Aether awaken us if we can’t work together?”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
